title: It Was Our Entire World
overview: Chakuro's peaceful life on the Mud Whale is interrupted by the appearance of another island. When they investigate, he finds a girl living there.

title: Criminals of Fálaina
overview: The rebellious Ouni takes Chakuro and Lykos back to her island. She explains that she's an Apátheia, a soldier who's lost her emotions.

title: I Don't Care About This World Anymore
overview: The Mud Whale is invaded by the ruthless and mysterious troops of the "Empire." Using magic, Ouni and some of the others begin fighting back.

title: We and the Mud Whale Will be Committed to the Sand
overview: After naming Suou the new mayor of the Mud Whale, the elders tells him some secrets. Chakuro has a disturbing vision when he meets Neri.

title: I Don't Want to Run Away
overview: The committee orders the vigilantes to attack the Nous, which Lykos says is the Mud Whale's heart. The island shakes while Ouni fights Shuan.

title: They Could Kill Someone Tomorrow
overview: The Mud Whale's magic users begin training to use their skills in combat as part of Suou's defense plan, but not everyone is happy with his decision.

title: I Want to See Your Futures
overview: Imperial forces attack the Mud Whale during a sandstorm. Now Ouni and Lykos must lead the defense squad to fight for the island.

title: Disappear From This World
overview: Lykos confronts the Imperial forces and Ouni attempts to help her and Chakuro reach the Nous. Shuan and Liontari continue their duel.

title: I Wish to See What Comes of the Choice You Have Made
overview: Though badly outnumbered, the Mud Whale's defenders continue to fight valiantly. Ouni and Nibi make a last stand against the Imperial forces.

title: Off on a New Journey
overview: The Mud Whale survivors hold funeral rites for friend and foe alike. Though peace seems to have returned, Lykos warns that her brother won't give up.

title: Just a Dream
overview: Orca is brought before the military high command for judgment, but he's in no mood to accept their decision. Lykos confronts Rochalízo.

title: Glad to Be Born Here
overview: Now that they know the truth, the Mud Whale's residents face a decision. Meanwhile, Orca carries out his own plans in the empire.
